description_long: This is a rectangular pop-up canopy tent with a peaked roof, supported by four slender metal poles at each corner. The canopy is made of a light-colored, likely weather-resistant fabric, stretched taut over a rigid frame. The tent's structure is simple and utilitarian, with no visible sidewalls, doors, or windows, making it suitable for temporary outdoor use such as markets, fairs, or events. The legs appear to be telescopic, allowing for adjustable height and easy transport. There are no visible guy lines, branding, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The tent provides ample shaded space beneath its roof, with open access from all sides.
description: A light-colored, peaked canopy tent with four metal poles and an open-sided design, ideal for outdoor events. The structure is simple, functional, and lacks visible branding or sidewalls.
description_view_0: Front view of the tent showing the peaked roof and two front support poles, with the open area beneath clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view identical to the front, displaying the same peaked roof and two visible poles, with no sidewalls or additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the same peaked roof and two rear support poles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the peaked roof and two poles, with open access beneath.
attribute_entrance_type: Open-sided with no visible doors or flaps; access is available from all four sides.
attribute_guy_line_configuration: No guy lines are visible; the tent is supported solely by four corner poles.
